{{Infobox starship
| name = Advocate ship
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|An individual [[Iron Legion]] ship might not match an [[Advocate ship]] of the same class.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocate]] ships have shields that can be overloaded.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator is amidst the wreckage of a destroyed [[Advocate ship]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
